classes.purpose: Judge claim support, reasoning quality, and proposed corrections
classes.content: Deep Research report; claims and surrounding text; citations; fetched or local source passages; diagnostics; proposed corrections and review decisions

boundaries_beyond_codex.destination: Public hosts named by URLs cited in the report
boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Retrieve cited source pages for claim-support review
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Each complete cited HTTP or HTTPS URL, request metadata, and the resulting public page response
controls: Fetch only URLs extracted from the supplied report inventory.
Read at most 1,000,000 response bytes per URL with a bounded timeout.
Use --no-fetch and local source files when network retrieval is unavailable or inappropriate.

security_controls.control: Run artifacts are written outside published repository paths.
